cpu: AMD A8-3850 APU with Radeon HD Graphics
notes: WARNING! DO NOT use "PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1" or your game will run in 1FPS! On MY system (see specs) running the game with default (latest) Proton version everything runs perfect at 60FPS (fullscreen/windowed - highest graphics) out of the box.
